'''âm-j-t''' ('''kamajat''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:negrify|negrify]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-j-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:negrify|negrify]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âm-j-t
|-
! Lemma
| kamajat
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thimajat|thimajat]] || [[word:jimajat|jimajat]] || [[word:shimajat|shimajat]] || [[word:kimajat|kimajat]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthumajat|thuthumajat]] || [[word:jujumajat|jujumajat]] || [[word:shushumajat|shushumajat]] || [[word:kukumajat|kukumajat]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thumajat|thumajat]] || [[word:jumajat|jumajat]] || [[word:shumajat|shumajat]] || [[word:kumajat|kumajat]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thumajat|thumajat]] || [[word:jumajat|jumajat]] || [[word:shumajat|shumajat]] || [[word:kumajat|kumajat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:themajat|themajat]] || [[word:jemajat|jemajat]] || [[word:shemajat|shemajat]] || [[word:kemajat|kemajat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothomajat|thothomajat]] || [[word:jojomajat|jojomajat]] || [[word:shoshomajat|shoshomajat]] || [[word:kokomajat|kokomajat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thomajat|thomajat]] || [[word:jomajat|jomajat]] || [[word:shomajat|shomajat]] || [[word:komajat|komajat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thomajat|thomajat]] || [[word:jomajat|jomajat]] || [[word:shomajat|shomajat]] || [[word:komajat|komajat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠmajat|thĂŠmajat]] || [[word:jĂŠmajat|jĂŠmajat]] || [[word:shĂŠmajat|shĂŠmajat]] || [[word:kĂŠmajat|kĂŠmajat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathamajat|thathamajat]] || [[word:jajamajat|jajamajat]] || [[word:shashamajat|shashamajat]] || [[word:kakamajat|kakamajat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thamajat|thamajat]] || [[word:jamajat|jamajat]] || [[word:shamajat|shamajat]] || [[word:kamajat|kamajat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thamajat|thamajat]] || [[word:jamajat|jamajat]] || [[word:shamajat|shamajat]] || [[word:kamajat|kamajat]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shamajat|shamajat]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshamajat|goshamajat]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishamajat|gokishamajat]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shamajatnĂŒ|shamajatnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshamajatnknĂŒ|goshamajatnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishamajatnĂŒ|gokishamajatnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shamajatshĂ«|shamajatshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshamajatnkshĂ«|goshamajatnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishamajatshĂ«|gokishamajatshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shamajatro|shamajatro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshamajatnkro|goshamajatnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishamajatro|gokishamajatro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shamajatmu|shamajatmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshamajatnkmu|goshamajatnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishamajatmu|gokishamajatmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shamajatsher|shamajatsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshamajatnksher|goshamajatnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishamajatsher|gokishamajatsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shamajatng|shamajatng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshamajatnkng|goshamajatnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishamajatng|gokishamajatng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shamajatya|shamajatya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshamajatnkya|goshamajatnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishamajatya|gokishamajatya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shamajatyam|shamajatyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshamajatnkyam|goshamajatnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishamajatyam|gokishamajatyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shamajatnĂŒshĂ«|shamajatnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshamajatnknĂŒshĂ«|goshamajatnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishamajatnĂŒshĂ«|gokishamajatnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shamajatnĂŒro|shamajatnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshamajatnknĂŒro|goshamajatnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishamajatnĂŒro|gokishamajatnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shamajatnĂŒmu|shamajatnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshamajatnknĂŒmu|goshamajatnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishamajatnĂŒmu|gokishamajatnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shamajatshĂ«nĂŒ|shamajatshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshamajatnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshamajatnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishamajatshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishamajatshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shamajatshĂ«ro|shamajatshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshamajatnkshĂ«ro|goshamajatnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishamajatshĂ«ro|gokishamajatshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shamajatshĂ«mu|shamajatshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshamajatnkshĂ«mu|goshamajatnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishamajatshĂ«mu|gokishamajatshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shamajatronĂŒ|shamajatronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshamajatnkronĂŒ|goshamajatnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishamajatronĂŒ|gokishamajatronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shamajatroshĂ«|shamajatroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshamajatnkroshĂ«|goshamajatnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishamajatroshĂ«|gokishamajatroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shamajatromu|shamajatromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshamajatnkromu|goshamajatnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishamajatromu|gokishamajatromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shamajatmunĂŒ|shamajatmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshamajatnkmunĂŒ|goshamajatnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishamajatmunĂŒ|gokishamajatmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shamajatmushĂ«|shamajatmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshamajatnkmushĂ«|goshamajatnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishamajatmushĂ«|gokishamajatmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shamajatmuro|shamajatmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshamajatnkmuro|goshamajatnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishamajatmuro|gokishamajatmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|654f723}}
